zh.lifeSummary: 當John Owen dePoultney於1414年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂時，他的父親Sir John Owen Poultney Knight29歲，母親Margaret Le Walsh22歲。他和Rosea Marie Graftiter至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1492年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Owen dePoultney于1414年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾考文垂时，他的父亲Sir John Owen Poultney Knight29岁，母亲Margaret Le Walsh22岁。他和Rosea Marie Graftiter至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1492年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When John Owen dePoultney was born in 1414, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Owen Poultney Knight, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Le Walsh, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Rosea Marie Graftiter. He died in 1492, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Owen dePoultney est né en 1414, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Owen Poultney Knight, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Le Walsh, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Rosea Marie Graftiter. Il est décédé en 1492, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Owen dePoultney 1414 in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Owen Poultney Knight 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Le Walsh 22. Er hatte mit Rosea Marie Graftiter mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1492 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Owen dePoultney è nato il nel 1414 nel Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Owen Poultney Knight, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Le Walsh, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Rosea Marie Graftiter. Morì nel 1492, nel Misterton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Owen dePoultneyが1414年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Owen Poultney Knightは29歳，母Margaret Le Walshは22歳であった。彼はRosea Marie Graftiterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1492年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Owen dePoultney(이)가 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Owen Poultney Knight(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Le Walsh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Rosea Marie Graftiter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Owen dePoultney nasceu em 1414, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Owen Poultney Knight, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Le Walsh, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Rosea Marie Graftiter. Ele faleceu em 1492, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Owen dePoultney родился в 1414 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Owen Poultney Knight было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Le Walsh, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Rosea Marie Graftiter. Он умер в 1492 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Owen dePoultney nació en 1414, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Owen Poultney Knight, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Le Walsh, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Rosea Marie Graftiter. Murió en 1492, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
